bounded_kv_copy.27b_d64_4prompt_effect: neutral at short-context one-block capacity: branch_copy full-KV 0.8590687996612969x AR, bounded-KV 0.8594881286952839x AR

q8_kv_scope.current_hot_path: BF16 paged KV write and BF16 paged/tree/full-attention kernels; AOTriton cache-backed path explicitly requires BF16 KV tensors.
q8_kv_scope.reference: hipfire uses separate q8_0/asym3 KV writers plus matching batched/tree attention kernels, e.g. reference/hipfire/kernels/src/kv_cache_write_q8_0_batched.hip and attention_flash_asym3_tile_batched.hip.
q8_kv_scope.decision: Do not port a c=1-only Q8 KV path for this round; it would not accelerate DFlash native bulk/tree verifier. Required work is a full Q8/asym KV storage mode and verifier attention kernel family.

correctness_gate.oracle: same-session greedy AR equality plus finite AR/draft/verify logits

decision.canonical_commit: branch_copy is a useful lower-cost exact canonical mode versus replay, but still below AR; bounded KV copy is retained for future longer-context capacity but neutral at D64 one-block contexts.
decision.tree_topology: current chain_as_tree and balanced branching_topk topologies are not speed wins; branching loses top-1 depth and should not be promoted.
decision.q8_kv: scoped as future kernel-family work, not an incremental benchmark toggle.
